description: Style NoteCrush-worthy colouring in this oh-so-cute flip flop style sandal from catwalk. Wear this with matching kurtas or tops and look great either way!Product DescriptionSoft footbed with fore foot straps that have fabric and crystal embellishmentsBranding embossed on a heel patch TPU out sole and a small oval lug at the heelMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
